heroTitle: Le Comptoir Circulaire — The B2B circular economy marketplace
heroSubtitle: Sell, collect and trace your recyclable materials. Reduce your carbon footprint with AI.
featuresHeading: 3 pillars for a complete circular economy
featuresSubheading: Everything you need to transform your industrial waste into growth opportunities.
feature1Description: Buy and sell recyclable materials between professionals on our B2B marketplace.
feature2Description: Track every material end-to-end with Polygon blockchain for full transparency.
feature3Description: Calculate your carbon footprint and generate CSR reports automatically with AI.
feature4Description: Our AI matches sellers with buyers based on material type, location and volume.
feature5Description: Stay compliant with EU circular economy regulations and reporting requirements.
feature6Description: Track your environmental impact with real-time analytics and performance metrics.
ctaPillText: Free to join — no credit card required.
ctaHeading: Ready to accelerate your circular transition?
ctaSubheading: Join hundreds of businesses already reducing waste and creating value from recyclable materials.
